name: brute-bonnet
flavor_texts: It is possible that the creature listed as Brute Bonnet in a certain book could actually be this Pokémon.
It bears a slight resemblance to a Pokémon described in a dubious magazine as a cross between a dinosaur and a mushroom.
text: Brute-bonnet is the Paradox Pokémon. It is a grass and dark-type Pokémon. Abilities: protosynthesis. Base stats — HP: 111, Attack: 127, Defense: 99, Sp. Atk: 79, Sp. Def: 99, Speed: 55. Evolution line: brute-bonnet. Lore: It is possible that the creature listed as Brute Bonnet in a certain book could actually be this Pokémon. It bears a slight resemblance to a Pokémon described in a dubious magazine as a cross between a dinosaur and a mushroom.
